title: TheVillage: Possession
description:
ANNOUNCEMENT📢 SOLO DEVELOPER

TheVillage: Possession is a solo-developed horror game created with Unreal Engine 5. Every aspect of the game from programming and gameplay design to level design has been developed by a single creator. Thank you for supporting indie game development!

🗺️ THEVILLAGE TheVillage: Possession is the first chapter of TheVillage, a planned horror game series.

Each game will explore a different story, mystery, and supernatural event connected to the same cursed universe. While every chapter can be enjoyed on its own, players who follow the series will gradually uncover the complete history behind the village and the darkness that surrounds it.

Exploration

🪆 Explore every dark corner of the village to recover the cursed doll's missing pieces.

👥 Possess different bodies to overcome powerful enemies and survive the horrors of the village.

👹 Face terrifying monsters that hunt you throughout the village.

Thank you for supporting this journey. Every Wishlist, review, and piece of feedback helps shape the future of TheVillage.

THEVILLAGE TRILOGYWelcome to TheVillage Trilogy.

TheVillage is a three-part horror series where each game reveals another piece of the mystery surrounding a cursed village and the failed ritual that changed it forever.

🕯️ TheVillage: Possession

The journey begins as a traveller returns to an abandoned village to uncover the truth behind a failed ritual while a mysterious force whispers through his mind.

🌑 TheVillage: Beginning (Planned)

Origins of the village and discover the events that led to the forbidden ritual and the darkness it unleashed.

🔥 TheVillage: Final Rituals (Planned)

The final chapter where every secret is revealed, the last ritual begins, and the fate of TheVillage is decided.

Thank you for supporting TheVillage. Your feedback and support help bring the remaining chapters to life.

🤝 Publishing & Investment OpportunitiesTheVillage is a three-part Game series being developed by me under GlitchMind Games. I'm currently seeking publishers, investors, and strategic partners who share my vision and are interested in helping bring the complete trilogy to players worldwide.

Business Contact:
📧 games@glitchmind.in

Об игреYears ago, you witnessed a mysterious ritual in a remote village. Before you could understand what was happening, the ritual failed, and a blinding light knocked you unconscious.

Unable to forget that night, you return years later in search of answers. The village now lies abandoned, its people gone without a trace.

As you explore its haunted streets, an unseen voice begins whispering in your mind, drawing you toward a dark secret buried between two worlds.

Solve puzzles, collect the scattered doll parts, survive supernatural horrors, and uncover the truth before you become part of Thevillage's fate.
description_short: TheVillage: Possession is a first-person horror game where you return to a cursed village to uncover the truth behind a failed ritual. Explore abandoned locations, solve puzzles, collect doll parts, and survive terrifying supernatural encounters while an unseen force manipulates your mind.
